item.title: What indempotency means
item.description: What python init.py is used for

item.title: SITE RELIABILITY ENGINEER - Reading Notes
item.description: SITE RELIABILITY ENGINEER - Reading Notes Part 1 - Introduction Chapter 1 - Introduction Hope is not a strategy At Google, most SREs are either from SoftDev team or are from closely related positions, but almost always they are devs Google’s approach has SREs dedicate at max 50% of their time to ops tickets, the other 50% is spent in developing We want systems that are automatic, not just automated
